summary: Separable resampling to a target extent with a fixed-definition filter (nearest / bilinear / bicubic Catmull-Rom / Lanczos-3); half-pixel-corrected pixel-center mapping, edge-clamped boundary.

outputs.name: image
outputs.doc: The resampled image (target extent; all other descriptor fields preserved).

params.name: width
params.doc: Target width in pixels (must be non-zero).

params.name: height
params.doc: Target height in pixels (must be non-zero).

params.name: filter
params.doc: The fixed-definition resampling filter: nearest (1 tap), bilinear (2), bicubic Catmull-Rom (4), or Lanczos-3 (6).

perceptual.reason: image.resize applies fixed-definition resampling kernels verified by analytic value tables and kernel algebra (identity-scale identity, nearest integer-translation exactness, constant preservation, tiling independence, band-limited round-trip tolerance); there is no perceptual-quality metric to apply
